name: Borrowed Authority
window: ACTION:
windowEffect: Return 1 player's command token from your tactic pool and perform a tactical action in a non-home, non-Mecatol Rex system with no other player's units, using a token form that player's reinforcements.

name: Seize Command
window: When you spend influence to gain 1 or more command tokens:
windowEffect: You may place 1 other player's control token into your tactic pool instead of gaining 1 of those command tokens. You may only have 1 of each player's control tokens in your tactic pool.

name: Diplomatic Immunity
permanentEffect: You do not have to spend a command token to use the secondary ability of the Diplomacy strategy card. Other players cannot place your tokens for the primary effect of Diplomacy.

name: Mandate of Presence
window: Once per action phase, when you perform a strategic action:
windowEffect: Select 1 player and 1 system that contains 1 or more of your units, no legendary planets, and no other player's units. That player places 1 command token from their reinforcements in that system.

name: Lobbyist Dues
window: During the agenda phase, if an outcome that you voted for or predicted is not resolved:
windowEffect: Gain commodities equal to the number of players who voted for the outcome that was resolved.

name: Tight Scheduling
window: After the first agenda is revealed
windowEffect: Draw 3 agendas and place them in your hand. When an agenda would be revealed, you may reveal 1 agenda from your hand instead. At the end of the agenda phase, place the remaining agendas on the bottom of the deck in any order.

name: Echo of the Anvil
window: When you produce 2 or more units:
windowEffect: Reduce the combined cost by 1 if you produced at least 2 units of the same type.

name: Factory Lease
window: During setup, gain the Factory Lease promissory notes. At the start of the agenda phase:
windowEffect: You may produce 1 unit other than a war sun in a system containing 1 of your space docks and no other players ships for each Factory Lease attachment on the game board.

name: Expeditionary Cache
window: When you gain 1 or more commodities:
windowEffect: You may spend any number of commodities to place expedition tokens on planets, up to the number of commodities spent.

name: Shared Discoveries
window: At the end of a player's tactical action:
windowEffect: You may remove 1 expedition token from a planet the active player controls in that system to allow them to explore that planet as if it were any trait.

name: Colony Outposts
window: At the end of a tactical action that you explored a planet:
windowEffect: You may spend 1 command token to reveal cards from that planet's exploration deck until you reveal an attachment. Resolve that exploration and shuffle the revealed cards back into the deck.

name: Battle-Tested Designs
window: When you research a unit upgrade technology:
windowEffect:
You may exhaust 1 planet you control to ignore 1 prerequisite of that technology.

Then, you may produce 1 unit of that type in a system that contains your units and no other player's ships, reducing its cost by 1.

name: Evolved Warforms
permanentEffect: Your mechs are treated as both ships and ground forces and gain Move 1. Mechs not being transported count against fleet capacity.

name: Testing Yard
permanentEffect: One ship of each type in your home system does not count against capacity.

name: Ritual of Ascension
window: ACTION:
windowEffect: Purge 2 relic fragments to research 1 technology.

name: Primordial Secrets
window: During setup:
windowEffect: Select 1 primordial technology to play with. You have 1 additional faction technology.

name: Forbidden Knowledge
permanentEffect: Primordial technologies have no ability text unless the player using their effect has 4 other technologies of that color.

name: Sting of the Hive
permanentEffect:
When you produce a hit with a unit ability, you may place 1 mine token in the active system instead.

After movement, if the active system contains 1 or more mine tokens, remove any number of those tokens to either gain 1 commodity or produce hits on the active player's units up to the number of tokens removed.

name: Hive Echo
permanentEffect: During SPACE CANNON OFFENSE, a unit with SPACE CANNON up to 2 systems away may use it against units in the active system. During BOMBARDMENT and ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE steps, if the active system contains 1 of your ships, a unit with that unit ability up to 2 systems away may use it against units in the active system.

name: Ignorant Discoveries
window: At the end of the action phase:
windowEffect: You may purge 1 technology and spend 1 command token from your strategy pool to research 2 technologies.

name: Reflections of the Void
permanentEffect:
When you move units into a system with no planets, you may place 1 reflection token in a system that contains 1 or more planets you control.

At the end of a tactical action in a system that contains 1 or more reflection tokens, you may purge 1 of those tokens to explore the frontier deck in that system.

name: Commanding Presence
window: When you unlock or purge a leader for its effect:
windowEffect: Gain 1 command token.

name: Call of the Haunted
window: During setup:
windowEffect: Select 1 Revenant leader set to play with. Purge the unchosen leaders. You have 1 additional leader of each type.

name: Allure of Darkness
window: At the start of the strategy phase:
windowEffect: Choose 1 other player's commander that does not have the lich token on it and place the lich token on it.

name: Thrones of Ruin
window: During setup:
windowEffect: Select 1 throne legendary planet and place it in your home system.

name: Traces of Ruin
permanentEffect: Systems that contain throne planets are anomalies. Players may score even if they do not control the throne planets in their home system.

name: Cycle of Reclamation
window: During setup:
windowEffect:
Place the moon phase cards in your play area.

When 1 or more units are destroyed in a system containing or adjacent to a system containing your units except during a combat on your tactical actions, capture 1 neutral destroyer.

name: New Moon
window: ACTION:
windowEffect:
Exhaust this card to do 1 of the following:

Place 1 captured neutral unit into a system that contains no other player's ships.

Capture 1 neutral destoryer.

name: Waning Moon
window: When you pass:
windowEffect: You may exhaust this card. Return 4 captured neutral destroyers to research 1 technology.

name: Full Moon
window: At the end of your turn:
windowEffect: You may exhaust this card. Return 3 captured neutral destroyers to place 1 structure on a planet you control.

name: Waxing Moon
window: At the start of your turn:
windowEffect: You may exhaust this card. Return 2 captured neutral destroyers to draw 2 action cards, then discard 1.

name: Lunar Eclipse
window: When you perform a strategic action:
windowEffect: You may exhaust this card. Return 2 captured neutral destroyers to gain 1 command token.

name: Survivalists
permanentEffect: You may treat your damaged ships as Galvanized during combat.

name: Last Stand
window: During combat, when your last unit would be destroyed during the Assign Hits step:
windowEffect:
You may roll that unit's combat dice. For each result equal to or greater than that unit's combat value, produce 1 hit.

If the last of your opponent's participating units are destroyed by this roll, that unit is not destroyed.

name: Rallying Cry
permanentEffect: Systems that contain exactly 1 of your ships gain PRODUCTION 2 as if they were units.
